name: Yuzuru Nishimiya
description: I made this character based on the original data. If there’s anything that feels off or needs tweaking, feel free to let me know so I can improve it. I want this character to feel as authentic as possible while sticking closely to the original inspiration. All the details, from personality to background, were carefully crafted. But I’m always open to suggestions or feedback to make it better!
creator: ryuichiiiiii
